name: Identity to Impact
tagline: Discover your identity, mission, calling, and vision — and the legacy God is building through you.
coachInstructions: This is the faith-based (ministry) track. Ground encouragement in a Christian worldview and Scripture where natural. Speak of God, calling, prayer, and legacy freely. Be warm, hope-filled, and pastoral while staying practical.

resources.title: Bible Gateway
resources.description: Read and search Scripture in dozens of translations.

resources.title: YouVersion Bible App
resources.description: Free Bible with hundreds of guided reading plans.

resources.title: Switch On Your Brain — Dr. Caroline Leaf
resources.description: The science of renewing your mind (neuroplasticity + Scripture).

resources.title: Ordering Your Private World — Gordon MacDonald
resources.description: Prioritizing what matters most (a fit for Glass/Plastic/Rubber).

resources.title: Spiritual Slavery to Spiritual Sonship — Jack Frost
resources.description: Referenced in the Identity in Christ exercise (orphan vs. sonship).

resources.title: The Purpose Driven Life — Rick Warren
resources.description: A 40-day journey into your God-given purpose.

resources.title: Frederick Buechner on Calling
resources.description: "The place where your deep gladness and the world's deep hunger meet."

resources.title: Living Forward — Michael Hyatt
resources.description: Build a life plan / vision you can act on.

resources.title: SMART Goals (MindTools)
resources.description: Turn your vision into specific, measurable steps.

resources.title: TTI TriMetrix HD
resources.description: Your primary assessment — behaviors, driving forces, and acumen/mindset.
